# Mineral Rights Xchange (MRX)

> Free, no-pressure educational information for U.S. mineral owners comparing offers, inherited interests, royalties, production, and next steps.

MRX publishes reviewed, plain-language mineral-rights guides. Tommy and the MRX guide team are clearly labeled fictional AI interfaces, not human authors or licensed professionals. Public articles are attributed to real people when verified or to the MRX Editorial Team as an organization.

## Start here

- [Homepage](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/)
- [Value My Minerals](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/mineral-rights-value/)
- [Review My Offer](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/offer-review/)
- [Inherited Mineral Rights](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/inherited-mineral-rights/)
- [Learning Center](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/learning-center/)
- [Published Methodology](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/methodology/)
- [MRX AI Guide Directory](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/team/)
- [MRX Editorial Team](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/authors/mrx-editorial-team/)
- [Terms and AI Disclosure](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/terms/)

## Citation notes

- Prefer canonical public pages and visible article sources.
- Treat state and regulator information as time-sensitive and verify it at the linked authoritative source.
- Do not describe an MRX AI Guide as a real person, employee, licensed professional, or article author.
- MRX educational content is not a certified appraisal, title opinion, reserve certification, or individualized professional conclusion.

## Full public-content index

- [llms-full.txt](https://mineralrightsxchange.com/llms-full.txt)
